PLAITIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL ISSUED BY THE COURT AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON 12/6/2005 IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. DISMISSAL IS ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. COURT ORDERED CASE SET FOR AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CRC 225 ON 4/11/2006 AT 10:00 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 212.
